name: mt3-infer
summary: Unified, inference-only toolkit for MT3 model family (Magenta MT3, MR-MT3, MT3-PyTorch, YourMT3)

        ---
        
        This project includes code adapted from the following sources:
        
        1. MR-MT3 (https://github.com/gudgud96/MR-MT3)
           License: MIT
           Copyright (c) 2024 Hao Hao Tan, Kin Wai Cheuk, Taemin Cho, Wei-Hsiang Liao, Yuki Mitsufuji
           Note: vendored in mt3_infer/models/mr_mt3/
        
        2. MT3-PyTorch (https://github.com/kunato/mt3-pytorch)
           License: No license declared upstream. Vendored code is retained
           unmodified; see mt3_infer/models/mt3_pytorch/. (Previously misattributed
           here to https://github.com/rlax59us/MT3-pytorch, which is not the
           repository the vendored code and adapter actually derive from -- the
           code and mt3_infer/adapters/mt3_pytorch.py have always cited kunato.)
        
        3. YourMT3 (https://huggingface.co/spaces/mimbres/YourMT3)
           License: Apache-2.0
           Copyright: 2024 The YourMT3 Authors
           Note: vendored in mt3_infer/models/yourmt3/
        
        Magenta MT3 (https://github.com/magenta/mt3, Apache-2.0, Google Research) is
        NOT currently vendored anywhere in this repository -- a prior version of
        this file credited it as such; that was inaccurate and has been removed.
        Support for it is deferred (see pyproject.toml's commented-out `jax` extra).
        
        See mt3_infer/models/yourmt3/LICENSE for the full Apache-2.0 license text.
